title: instrumentation.c: Use-after-Py_DECREF comparison in call_one_instrument
author: lpyu001
body:
# Bug report

### Bug description:

## Summary

At line 992-993, Py_DECREF(res) then res compared to &_PyInstrumentation_DISABLE. Using a potentially-freed pointer in comparison is UB per C standard.


This is a sub-issue of https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/146102 with [gist details](https://gist.github.com/devdanzin/330026d6a4c40048c771a61f706ac75e)


### CPython versions tested on:

CPython main branch

### Operating systems tested on:

_No response_
